title: A Hard Day’s Rut
description: The first film from the English rock band, The Rutles, as they prepare for a big performance.
parent: The Rutles: All You Need is Cash
altHero: the Rutles performing on a white sound stage
alt1: the Rutles on a building’s roof, shading their faces with their hands
alt2: the Rutles all in black, in a field, with their hands tucked into their shirts
alt4: The Rutles having a photo taken in the park
